pages.speaker: Nurse Lace
pages.text: Welcome to the Lace-Up Sneaker Clinic! We restore sneakers to perfect condition.

pages.speaker: Nurse Lace
pages.text: All done! Your sneakers are in perfect condition. Come back any time!

pages.speaker: Retro Rick
pages.text: Welcome to Retro Rick's Vintage Shop! I've got the freshest old-school gear in the city.

pages.speaker: Retro Rick
pages.text: Check out my selection of Sole Sauce, Insole Pads, and Sneaker Cases. Quality guaranteed!

pages.speaker: Passerby
pages.text: That's the Sneaker Clinic. They'll restore all your sneakers to full health for free!

pages.speaker: Shopper
pages.text: Retro Rick's has the best deals on supplies. Stock up before heading into tall grass!

pages.speaker: Professor
pages.text: The Sneaker Museum documents centuries of footwear history. Did you know type matchups were codified in the Great Drip Wars of '92?

pages.speaker: Professor
pages.text: Retro beats High-Fashion. Techwear beats Retro. Skate beats Techwear. High-Fashion beats Skate. It's a perfect circle of style!

pages.speaker: Local
pages.text: Welcome to Lace-Up Village! The gym here specializes in Retro-type training.

pages.speaker: Local
pages.text: The gym leader is pretty tough though. You'll want a full team before challenging them!

pages.speaker: Villager
pages.text: I heard there's a Syndicate operative spotted near Route 2. Be careful if you head east!
